items.title: The $292 million Kelp exploit: how it happened, and what it means for DeFi
items.summary: 2026 is shaping up to be DeFi's "worst year in terms of hacks," Ledger's CTO said, as the Kelp exploit shows how a single point of failure can cascade across systems.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Stablecoins not a threat to banks in the near-term: Moody's analyst
items.summary: A prohibition on yield-bearing stablecoins and robust payments infrastructure in the US means stablecoins will not eat into banks' market share.

items.title: Kelp DAO Exploit Sparks Aave Liquidity Crunch, $6.2 Billion Withdrawal Panic
items.summary: After attackers drained $291 million in crypto from Kelp DAO-linked infrastructure, DeFi users struggled on Aave to withdraw funds.

items.title: 2024 BTC cycle 'dramatically' underperforming previous halvings: Analyst
items.summary: Volatility and upside have been declining with each Bitcoin halving cycle, but the new dynamics may not be permanent, according to Galaxy's Alex Thorn.

items.title: Previewing Consensus' Policy Summit: State of Crypto
items.summary: Every year policy discussions get more important, and this year's even more so.

items.title: Web3 VCs have a differentiation problem
items.summary: When every fund claims the same great networks and strong relationships, nobody wins. Bauer, Co-Founder of TBV, offers a more rigorous framework for emerging managers to build a unique value proposition.

items.title: 'DeFi is dead': crypto community scrambles after this year's biggest hack exposes contagion risks
items.summary: Developers and traders warn of structural risks as a cross-chain exploit spreads fear and prompts billions to flee DeFi platforms.

items.title: The 10 Public Companies With the Biggest Bitcoin Portfolios
items.summary: Companies like Strategy, Twenty One, and Metaplanet hold billions of dollars' worth of Bitcoin. These are the biggest publicly traded whales.

items.title: Kelp exploit highlights problem with non-isolated DeFi lending: Crypto execs
items.summary: The contagion from the Kelp exploit could have been contained, but at the cost of capital efficiency, according to the founder of Curve Finance.

items.title: AI Traffic to US Retailers Jumps 393% in Q1 as Agentic Shoppers Outspend Humans
items.summary: AI-driven traffic to U.S. retail sites surged in early 2026, and those visitors are generating more revenue than regular shoppers.

items.title: Stablecoins can help businesses turn costs into revenue, Paxos Labs cofounder says
items.summary: Firms using stablecoins can reshape margins by cutting costs, unlock credit and earn yield, but not every company needs to issue a token, Paxos Labs' Chunda McCain said.

items.title: Aave sees $6 billion deposit drop as Kelp hack exposes structural risk for DeFi lender
items.summary: The AAVE token fell 16% and deposits fled the protocol after attackers used drained rsETH as collateral to borrow wrapped ether, leaving Aave to quantify how much bad debt it is now carrying.

items.title: RaveDAO's RAVE token collapses 90% in a day as exchange probes widen
items.summary: The token traded at $1.15 on Sunday, down from a $27.33 peak on Friday, wiping out more than $5 billion in market cap as investigations into Binance and Bitget advance.

items.title: Inside the rise of wrench attacks against crypto holders and how France has become the focus
items.summary: France has seen 41 crypto-related kidnappings this year, roughly one every 2.5 days, prompting authorities to step up security.

items.title: Nomura study says 65% of institutional investors see crypto as a vital portfolio diversifier
items.summary: A new survey from Nomura and Laser Digital shows improving sentiment among institutional investors, as regulatory clarity and new products drive deeper engagement with digital assets.

items.title: Bitcoin price drops to $75K as new Hormuz closure puts focus on oil
items.summary: Bitcoin foreshadows fresh market mayhem as it appears that the US-Iran war has returned, including the closure of the Strait of Hormuz oil route.

items.title: One person holds the keys to $200 million of a project’s crypto. His co-founder says that has to end
items.summary: Co-founders Da Hongfei and Erik Zhang have conflicting restructuring plans, Da wants independent governance and multi-sig protection; Zhang wants accountability investigations and to remain on the board.

items.title: Aluminum giant Alcoa to sell dormant smelter to Bitcoin miner NYDIG: Report
items.summary: Alcoa is nearing a deal to sell its idle upstate New York Massena East smelter to NYDIG as US industrial sites increasingly shift toward Bitcoin mining and AI data centers.

items.title: Charles Schwab, Citadel Securities weigh entering prediction markets
items.summary: Charles Schwab and Citadel Securities executives have separately aired interest in prediction markets, but each is looking to steer clear of sports offerings.

items.title: Caitlyn Jenner escapes memecoin lawsuit as judge says token not a security
items.summary: A federal judge has tossed a class lawsuit over Caitlyn Jenner’s memecoin, saying it did not plausibly allege that the token was an unregistered security.

items.title: Warren claims SEC’s Atkins likely misled Congress over enforcement data
items.summary: SEC chair Paul Atkins is under fire from Senator Elizabeth Warren, who says he “may have been deliberately trying” to mislead Congress about the agency’s enforcement activity.

items.title: Kelp restaking platform exploited, $293M drained in attack
items.summary: The attack triggered a "cross-protocol contagion" that has hit at least nine crypto protocols, blockchain security firm Cyvers said.

items.title: 2026's biggest crypto exploit: $292 million gets drained from Kelp DAO with wrapped ether stranded across 20 chains
items.summary: An attacker drained 116,500 rsETH, roughly 18% of circulating supply, from Kelp's LayerZero-powered bridge on Saturday, triggering emergency freezes across Aave, SparkLend, Fluid and Upshift.

items.title: Solana futures open interest rose by 20% this week: Is $100 SOL next?
items.summary: SOL’s steady recovery alongside the wider crypto market has traders debating whether $100 could be the next stop for the altcoin.

items.title: Why Michael Saylor's Strategy decided to make STRC's dividend bi-monthly

items.summary: Alcoa is in advanced negotiations to sell its dormant Massena East smelter in upstate New York to Bitcoin mining firm NYDIG.

items.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty falls, but projected to rise in next adjustment
items.summary: The average block time at publication is about 9.8 minutes, falling slightly short of the 10-minute block target, according to CoinWarz.

items.title: GalaxyOne Head Wants Retail Investors to Stake More, Predict Less
items.summary: Zac Prince, head of Galaxy’s retail platform, said he struggles to see prediction markets in diversified portfolios for long-term investors.

items.title: AI is increasingly eating into VC fundings and here is how crypto firms are adapting
items.summary: AI companies raised $242 billion (80% of global venture funding) in early 2026, with Gartner projecting total AI spending will reach $2.52 trillion this year.

items.title: Iran views BTC as a strategic asset, but USDt still dominates oil tolls: BPI
items.summary: The Iranian government chose Bitcoin as a payment method for oil tolls due to its confiscation-resistant properties, but only dollar stablecoins have been used so far.

items.title: Binance and Bitget to probe RAVE’s 4,500% token surge as claims of insider-orchestrated rally grow
items.summary: Nearly 90% of RAVE's supply was concentrated in just three wallets, and millions of tokens were transferred to exchanges before the price surge.

items.title: Zondacrypto under fire as Poland's prime minister links exchange to legislative interference
items.summary: The company also disclosed a 4,500 BTC wallet that it can't access due to missing private keys linked to a former CEO, who's now missing.

items.title: Bitcoin 'plebs eat first' mining pool Parasite finds its second BTC block

items.summary: GPT-Rosalind is OpenAI's first domain-specific model, built for drug discovery and life sciences—and it's not for everyone.

items.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded nearly $1 billion in weekly inflows, their strongest performance in over three months amid improving risk sentiment.

items.summary: The price of Bitcoin breaks a seven-month downtrend as geopolitical shifts and prediction markets point to $84K next.

items.summary: Rep. Sheri Biggs purchased up to $250,000 worth of BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF last month, padding a position she entered into last July.

items.summary: Bitcoin spiked above $77,000 as stock indices set records, following word that Iran's Strait of Hormuz is open during the ceasefire.

items.summary: The acquisition will give Kraken access to complete CFTC-licensed crypto derivatives infrastructure in the U.S.
